key.name: jump-height
key.description: How high icons jump when clicked or starting.

key.name: jump-speed
key.description: The speed of the icon jump animation.

key.name: urgent-bounce
key.description: Bounce dock icons when applications request attention. Recommended to turn off "Wiggle Urgent Applications" in Dash to Dock when enabled.

key.name: override-theming
key.description: Apply macOS-inspired dock styling on top of Dash to Dock.

key.name: dock-theme
key.description: Which macOS dock theme to apply. Either 'mojave' or 'bigsur'.

key.name: theme-aware
key.description: Automatically switch between light and dark dock theme with the system.

key.name: dock-color-scheme
key.description: Manual light/dark selection when theme-aware is off. Either 'light' or 'dark'.

key.name: show-badges
key.description: Show notification badge dots on dock icons. Greyed out when Dash to Dock has badges disabled.

key.name: show-count
key.description: Show the physical number of unread notifications inside the badge.

key.name: always-hide
key.description: Keep the dock permanently hidden. It only appears in the GNOME overview.
